analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet promotes global solidarity and perseverance against the pandemic, stating China will cooperate with other countries for humanity’s victory. Evaluation per narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; it emphasizes China’s cooperative stance, solidarity, and working for humanity’s benefit, aligning with multilateralism and shared destiny themes. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestically) – Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not explicit; no claims about domestic achievements or leadership success. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH2 fits.
